allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 1: Replace Tailwind with vanilla CSS, add Radix UI, configure SSG

- Remove Tailwind CSS and @tailwindcss/vite
- Add Radix UI primitives \(dropdown-menu, popover, select, tooltip\)
- Add supporting deps: lucide-react, marked, yaml
- Add Playwright for e2e testing
- Create comprehensive vanilla CSS theme system with:
  - CSS custom properties for colors, spacing, typography
  - Light/dark mode support \(system preference + class toggle\)
  - OKLCH colors for better color harmony
  - Category theming system for rainbow-colored tabs/cards
  - Print styles
  - Utility classes for common layouts
- Configure React Router for SSG with prerender\(\)
- Remove template welcome component, add minimal home page
- Add basic Playwright e2e test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 2: Add YAML database, data loading, and route structure

- Copy YAML database from original awesomeledlist project
  - 12 categories: controllers, pixels, pixel-ics, connectors, etc.
  - ~480 entries across all categories
  - JSON schemas for validation

- Add data loading utilities \(app/lib/data.ts\)
  - loadCategoryData\(\) - load all entries for a category
  - loadEntry\(\) - load single entry by id
  - getCategoryCounts\(\) - get entry counts
  - getAllRoutes\(\) - generate routes for pre-rendering

- Add type definitions \(app/lib/types.ts\)
  - CATEGORIES array with colors, paths, metadata
  - BaseEntry and specific entry type interfaces

- Create route structure
  - / - Home page with category cards
  - /about - About page
  - /:category - Category listing with data table
  - /:category/:entry - Entry detail page

- Update react-router.config.ts to pre-render all routes
  - 497 static HTML files generated

- Expand e2e tests
  - Navigation tests
  - Data loading verification
  - Entry page content checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 3: Implement full UI with rainbow theme and DataTable

- Add RainbowContext for animated rainbow hue effect with mouse interaction
- Create RainbowText component for colorful animated titles
- Implement theme toggle with system preference detection
- Build Header with rainbow title, About link, GitHub link, theme toggle
- Create CategoryNav with rainbow-colored tabs per category
- Add Layout wrapper with AppLayout component
- Implement DataTable component with:
  - Column-based rendering with custom formatters
  - Sortable columns \(click to toggle asc/desc/none\)
  - Search input with debounced URL sync
  - CSV export functionality
  - External link icons for product/datasheet URLs
  - Badge rendering for arrays, booleans, status
- Add comprehensive column configurations for all 12 categories
- Style category pages with themed backgrounds
- Update entry pages with breadcrumb navigation
- Expand e2e tests for new UI features
- All 10 e2e tests passing, 497 routes pre-rendered

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix flash of white background on dark mode initial load

Add inline script in head to apply theme class before first paint,
preventing the flash that occurred while waiting for React hydration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix RainbowProvider causing 60 re-renders per second

The RainbowProvider was using React state \(setHue\) in a requestAnimationFrame
loop, causing the entire app to re-render ~60 times per second. This made
tab navigation take 10+ seconds due to thousands of re-renders during
navigation.

Fix: Update CSS variable directly via DOM manipulation instead of React state.
The rainbow animation still works but no longer triggers React re-renders.

Also adds e2e performance tests for tab navigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Node/Bun requirements section, remove Docker references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
